title: 22 - At the Post Office
description: ارسال یک بسته از اداره پست.

sentences.text: Good morning. I want to send this package.
sentences.translation: صبح بخیر. می‌خواهم این بسته را بفرستم.

sentences.text: It is a little heavy. Where is it going?
It is going abroad, to Spain.
Do you want fast or slow delivery?

sentences.translation: سریع، لطفاً. چند روز طول می‌کشد؟

sentences.text: About four days. Please write the address here.
sentences.translation: حدود چهار روز. لطفاً آدرس را اینجا بنویسید.

sentences.text: Done. Do I need a stamp?
No, the box price includes it. Please sign here.
sentences.translation: نه، قیمت بسته شامل آن می‌شود. لطفاً اینجا را امضا کنید.

sentences.text: Here you are. Can I have a receipt?
Of course. We will deliver it soon.
